summary: REGRESSION pass after 3 hygiene refactors. Backend 19/19 pytest tests green. Playwright verified all critical flows end-to-end: dashboard empty/filter-empty/rows IIFE render, ProjectDialog empty-name toast still fires, all 3 dialogs (Project/Entry/Share) open with ZERO Radix 'Missing Description' aria warnings, status dropdown, checkbox strikethrough, project CRUD (row-menu delete), entry CRUD with total_hours rollup (5.5→6.25→6.0→5.5), share dialog copy+rotate, /share/<token> read-only view (no edit controls, expandable time log with entries), /share/BADTOKEN shows 'Link unavailable'.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard IIFE render block (lines 181-234) is clean and readable — good refactor from nested ternary.
Radix DialogDescription now present in ProjectDialog, EntryDialog, ShareDialog — aria warning fully resolved (0 observed across all 3 dialog opens).
console.error removal in catch blocks is safe: user-facing toast is still shown ('Project name is required', 'Failed to save project', etc.). No silent failures observed.
ProjectRow still has duplicate testid attributes (data-testid AND data-testid-project on same div, lines 71-72). Non-blocking but non-canonical; consider consolidating.
ProjectRow.remove and ProjectDetail.removeEntry/removeProject use window.confirm — works but shadcn AlertDialog would be more consistent with the rest of the UI. Non-blocking.
compute_total_hours is O(N) mongo queries per /api/projects and /api/share/<token>. Fine at current scale; consider $lookup aggregation if project count grows.
seed_data_creation: Created + deleted a TEST_Playwright_<ts> project during the run. Also created + edited + deleted a temporary entry on 'Q1 Brand Video' (total_hours restored to 5.5). Seeded data preserved: 'Q1 Brand Video' (5.5h, in_progress, 2 entries), 'Website Redesign' (delivered).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite at /app/backend/tests/test_hours_ledger.py runs in ~9s and validates all 19 CRUD/stats/share endpoints. Playwright selectors of note: row status trigger = [data-testid='project-status-btn-{id}'], row checkbox = [data-testid='project-check-{id}'], row menu = [data-testid='project-menu-{id}'] with children project-edit-{id}/project-delete-{id}. ProjectDetail uses [data-testid='new-entry-btn'] (NOT add-entry-btn). Row/entry deletion uses window.confirm — attach page.on('dialog', accept). Shared-view expandable row = [data-testid='shared-project-{id}']; label reads 'TIME LOG' (uppercase, tracked spacing).
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. All 3 hygiene refactors (IIFE render, console.error removal, DialogDescription) confirmed working: 0 aria warnings, 0 console errors, all toasts still fire on error paths, all UI branches (empty/filter-empty/rows) render correctly.
